dead.example: The dead tree in the yard still provides a home for birds.
dead.exampleCn: 院子里那棵枯死的树仍然为鸟儿提供了一个家。

wonder.example: I wonder what life will be like when I grow up.
wonder.exampleCn: 我想知道我长大后生活会是什么样子。

suggest.example: My teacher suggests that we read one book every month.
suggest.exampleCn: 我的老师建议我们每个月读一本书。
